name: Gateway Restart Notifier
description: Post a Discord alert when the OpenClaw Gateway comes back after a supervised restart.

channelId.description: Discord channel id where restart alerts should be posted.

channelIds.description: Discord channel ids where restart alerts should be posted.

startupDelayMs.description: Delay before posting so the Discord outbound adapter is ready.

maxHandoffAgeMs.description: Maximum restart handoff age accepted for notification.
